# assets/

Place `AutoOpenRGB.svg` here before running the build pipeline.

The build pipeline (`setup/build.py`) will generate:
- `AutoOpenRGB.ico` — multi-resolution Windows icon (generated from SVG)

## Required file

- `AutoOpenRGB.svg` — application icon (provided by user, not tracked in git)

## Generated files

- `AutoOpenRGB.ico` — generated by `setup/svg_to_ico.py`, committed to git
